assumptions.text:
System assumes access control: SYSTEM SECURITY ARCHITECTURE

Access to the production environment is restricted to authorized personnel only.
System assumes identity posture: All users must authenticate using MFA before accessing any production systems.
System assumes configuration state: All data stored in the database is encrypted at rest using AES-256.
System assumes governance compliance: Security audits are conducted quarterly by an independent third party.
